generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled actuator for automated lighting control integrated with BIM model and configured via Ditto for runtime configuration and bidirectional communication with the Digital Twin."
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded Building Control System (BCS) controller executing commands derived from the Digital Twin's virtual environment, supporting HVAC setpoint adjustments."
]

instance EmbeddedPLC : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Programmable Logic Controller (PLC) interfacing with physical infrastructure to execute control signals generated by the Digital Twin via standardized middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto)."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-based occupancy sensor collecting real-time occupancy data from building spaces, transmitting via Eclipse Hono middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring temperature, humidity, and CO2 levels in real-time, integrated with BIM metadata for spatial context."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building energy monitor tracking electricity consumption metrics at component and system levels, feeding data to Ditto for processing."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT light level sensor measuring ambient light conditions for adaptive lighting control optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMonitor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Static Building Information Model containing geometry, topology, and component relationships enriched with runtime metadata (device IDs, control logic) for semantic consistency."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

instance RuntimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data ingested via Eclipse Hono and processed in Ditto, including sensor readings and control signals."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted, EnergyDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance ControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific control logic embedded in BIM model for automated execution via Ditto, including lighting system configurations and adaptive policies."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization model implemented in Unreal Engine 5 for real-time monitoring and user interaction with Digital Twin data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance AnalyticsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Machine learning models (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS) for adaptive optimization of energy consumption and visual comfort."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight IoT connectivity middleware enabling real-time data ingestion from physical sensors to the Digital Twin via standardized protocols."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Device management platform enabling bidirectional communication and runtime configuration of IoT devices, acting as the central hub for Digital Twin operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceManagementService, ControlExecutionService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization platform providing interactive Digital Twin monitoring and control through 3D environments and real-time data visualization."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework automating BIM-to-Digital Twin transformation via model-to-model and model-to-text techniques, reducing manual effort."
]

instance TwinLightPlugin : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom plugin for lighting system control embedded within the Digital Twin architecture, enabling domain-specific automation."
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlExecutionService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive visualization of operational data (sensor readings, energy consumption) via Unreal Engine 5 for real-time interaction."
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyVisualizationInsight, EnergyConsumptionInsight
]

instance DeviceManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing bidirectional communication and runtime configuration of IoT devices through Eclipse Ditto platform."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceConfigurationAction
]

instance ControlExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing control signals generated by the Digital Twin to physical actuators via standardized middleware."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingAdjustmentAction, HVACSetpointAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service integrating reinforcement learning models (e.g., BOREALIS) for predictive maintenance and adaptive optimization."
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight, OptimizationRecommendationAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing 3D interactive visualization of Digital Twin data through Unreal Engine 5 platform."
    DTDFVocab:provides InteractiveDashboardInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OccupancyVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of occupancy patterns in building spaces for facility monitoring and space utilization analysis."
]

instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational analytics dashboard showing real-time energy consumption metrics for building systems."
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance alerts identifying sensor or device anomalies based on reinforcement learning models."
]

instance OptimizationRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustments to control policies (e.g., lighting setpoints) for energy/comfort optimization."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeviceConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Runtime configuration of IoT devices through Ditto platform for parameter adjustments and firmware updates."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control of lighting systems based on occupancy and environmental conditions derived from Digital Twin analysis."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACSetpointAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of HVAC setpoints to optimize energy efficiency while maintaining occupant comfort."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance InteractiveDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D dashboard enabling real-time interaction with Digital Twin data for facility monitoring and decision-making."
]

// C18: Environments/Components
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LightingActuator, HVACController, OccupancySensor, EnvironmentalSensor, EnergyMonitor, LightLevelSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinVirtualEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BIMModel, RuntimeOperationalData, ControlModel, SimulationModel, AnalyticsModel
]

instance TwinLightControlComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Domain-specific control component for lighting systems embedded within the Digital Twin architecture, enabling automated policy execution."
]

instance DittoDeviceManagementComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized device management component within Eclipse Ditto platform handling bidirectional communication and runtime configuration."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** is enabled via **bidirectional communication protocols** between the DT and the physical infrastructure. The framework leverages:
  - **Eclipse Ditto** for **real-time command execution**, allowing the DT to send control signals (e.g., adjust lighting, HVAC setpoints) to actuators in the physical system.
  - **Standardized middleware interfaces** (e.g., RESTful APIs) to translate virtual control logic into executable commands for BCS devices.
  - **Unreal Engine 5** for **interactive visualization**, where user-defined control actions (e.g., via Facility Managers) are translated into physical adjustments through the Ditto/Hono pipeline."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale operates at **real-time frequencies**, ensuring continuous synchronization between physical and virtual domains. The framework supports **millisecond-to-second granularity** for critical control operations (e.g., lighting adjustments) and **hourly-to-daily aggregation** for broader operational analytics and optimization. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** evaluates the fidelity of this synchronization, ensuring the DT remains dynamically aligned with physical changes."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **DT constellation** is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, middleware-centric architecture** with the following components:
  - **BIM Backbone**: Central repository for **static and enriched models** (e.g., device configurations, spatial relationships).
  - **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono (ingestion) and Ditto (processing/command execution) for **real-time synchronization**.
  - **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for **interactive 3D monitoring** and user interaction.
  - **Service Layer**: Modular services (e.g., control logic, analytics) integrated via **standardized APIs**.
  - **Physical Layer**: IoT devices (sensors/actuators) and BCS components connected via **bidirectional communication protocols**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **multiple life-cycle stages**, spanning:
  - **Design phase**: BIM models are enriched with **runtime semantics** (e.g., sensor/actuator configurations) for DT deployment.
  - **Construction phase**: Physical devices are commissioned and integrated with the DT via middleware (Hono/Ditto).
  - **Operation phase**: Real-time monitoring, control, and optimization occur through **continuous synchronization** with the physical infrastructure.
  - **Adaptation phase**: DT services evolve via **custom service integration** (e.g., new analytics plugins) or **reinforcement learning updates** (e.g., BOREALIS project). The DT represents the **as-operated** state of the physical twin, with validation mechanisms (e.g., ODTE metric) ensuring alignment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Semantic consistency**: MDE-driven transformations maintain alignment between BIM models and runtime artifacts.
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto ensure **low-latency data exchange** to minimize divergence.
  - **Validation metrics**: **ODTE (Overall Digital Twin Entanglement)** quantifies alignment between PT and DT, with thresholds defining acceptable fidelity.
  - **Uncertainty handling**: Reinforcement learning models (e.g., BOREALIS) account for **sensor noise and environmental variability** via iterative policy refinement.
  - **Verification**: Automated checks for **data consistency** (e.g., sensor readings vs. BIM configurations) during deployment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** as its **technical connection middleware**, facilitating **secure, standardized communication** between physical sensors/actuators and the virtual DT. While specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, HTTP/REST) are not explicitly detailed, the framework ensures **bidirectional, low-latency data exchange** to enable **closed-loop control** and **real-time monitoring**. The architecture adheres to **industry-standard integration frameworks** for interoperability."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed in a **modular, service-oriented architecture** designed for **scalability and maintainability**. The framework supports **cloud-native deployment** (implied by the use of middleware like Hono/Ditto) and **on-premise integration** as needed. The **Unreal Engine** visualization layer can be hosted separately for **high-performance rendering**, while the **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** components manage **device connectivity and runtime interfaces**. The modular design allows for **incremental scaling** of services without disrupting core functionality."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The framework emphasizes **horizontal integration** through **standardized extension points** and **interoperability frameworks** (e.g., Eclipse Hono/Ditto). While specific protocols (e.g., OPC UA) are not mentioned, the architecture supports **seamless communication** with external systems (e.g., IoT platforms, enterprise resource planning tools) to enable **cross-domain data exchange**. The modular design facilitates **plug-and-play integration** of additional services, ensuring **scalable, interoperable DT ecosystems**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, primarily **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**, which provides the **semantic foundation** for the system. The architecture leverages **standardized middleware frameworks** (e.g., Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for **interoperability** and **real-time data exchange**. While **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** are implied as a potential BIM standard, the framework does not explicitly reference them. The use of **model-driven engineering (MDE)** ensures **consistent, reusable, and compliant** DT deployments across projects."
]
